meta.homeDescription: Dolphin Pet Supplies — food, accessories, toys and grooming products for all pets at the best prices and quality in Egypt.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn about Dolphin's story and our values in pet care.
meta.productsDescription: Browse our full range of pet food, accessories and supplies.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with the Dolphin team for any inquiry or special request.

hero.title: Everything
hero.subtitle: Fresh food, toys, accessories and grooming essentials picked with love for every kind of pet — from cats and dogs to birds and fish.

categories.title: Shop by Category
categories.subtitle: Everything your pet needs, organized for easy browsing

about.title: Our passion is animals, our mission is their comfort
about.p1: Dolphin started as a small project born from real love for pets, and has grown into one of the leading specialty stores offering everything your four-legged friend needs — from fresh food to grooming tools and accessories.
about.p2: We carefully select every product and work with trusted suppliers to ensure quality and safety. Our team is made up of animal lovers who understand the needs of every species and breed.
about.value1Desc: Every product is carefully checked before it reaches your pet.
about.value2Desc: From cats and dogs to birds and fish, we cover every need.
about.value3Desc: Our team helps you choose what's best for your pet and your budget.
about.value4Desc: We deliver quickly with careful, secure packaging.

products.title: Our Full Range
products.subtitle: Browse by category, or use search to quickly find what you need
products.noResults: No matching products found, try a different search.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: The trust of thousands of customers is our badge of honor
testimonials.t1Text: Such a great experience, genuine products and the cat food I buy is always in stock at great prices. Delivery is excellent every time.
testimonials.t2Text: Best place I've found for large-breed dog food variety. The team responds quickly to any question and helps you pick the right product.
testimonials.t3Text: I've ordered from Dolphin multiple times — consistent quality and very fast delivery. They truly understand what your pet needs.
testimonials.t4Text: Their range of cages and bird supplies is excellent and hard to find elsewhere. Thank you Dolphin for the great service.
